info.name: Game Recommendation Backend API
info.description: Complete API collection for testing the Game Recommendation Backend with authentication, game management, external API integration, hardware-based recommendations, and UI content management.

Delete a game (requires admin access)
Fetch games from external APIs (RAWG, IGDB, Steam)
Get cache statistics
Get all cache entries (paginated)
Refresh cache for specific specs
Invalidate cache by IDs or source
Cleanup expired cache entries
Trigger AI game discovery based on target specs
Get AI discovery service status
Get game recommendations based on hardware specs
